hero.description: Currently looking for a work-study program for a Master's degree in IT Project Management.

about.title: About
about.paragraph1: Fullstack developer passionate about building web applications with solid architecture. I mainly work with React and Symfony to build fullstack solutions, from front-end to back-end. Curious and detail-oriented, I enjoy understanding business needs and turning them into concrete features.
about.paragraph2: Currently in my 3rd year of a Computer Science degree, I'm looking for a work-study position in application development for a Master's degree. My goal: combine my technical expertise with project management skills to support teams and invest in projects from start to finish.

projects.kraft: Complete web application for client and project management (CRM-like).
projects.rentacarlens: Client app, API server and mobile app for vehicle rental.
projects.fittrack: Mobile app for tracking workouts and nutrition.
